_comment: Schiltron formation-change demo, split out of the combined schiltron.json into a dedicated clip -- see demos/README.md. No cavalry at all, so there's no spawn-facing-flip churn and no combat to distract from the transition itself. A single player Infantry unit spawns in NORMAL formation, gets selected, and the clip shows the Shift+O jump straight to Schiltron -- the block relaying out into the real outward-facing hollow square. Recorded as a standalone GIF for the PR description (not the CI-posted demo.488.json clip, which shows the receiving-the-charge scenario instead). Deterministic (seed + scripted input, no scenario override -- uses the default line spawn).
